name: Mistral NeMo 12B
note: 12B dense model co-built with NVIDIA; 128k context, Apache 2.0, new Tekken tokenizer; now in Mistral's retirement window.

results.notes: OpenBookQA 0-shot, from the official HF model card's Main Benchmarks table.
TruthfulQA 0-shot, from the official HF model card's Main Benchmarks table.
MMLU-Pro listed in the HF model card's evaluation results section.

verificationNotes: Fetched mistral.ai/news/mistral-nemo/ directly: confirms 2024-07-18 release, 12B params, 128K context, Apache 2.0, function calling, 11 languages listed (English/French/German/Spanish/Italian/Portuguese/Chinese/Japanese/Korean/Arabic/Hindi). Fetched HF model card directly: MMLU 68.0, HellaSwag 83.5, Winogrande 76.8, TriviaQA 73.8 all match exactly. Docs.mistral.ai confirms model is now deprecated with retirement date 2026-07-31 (essentially now) -- status/note updated to reflect this. Pricing $0.15/$0.15 corroborated by multiple independent aggregators (Sim.ai, Inworld, pricepertoken.com) tied to official Mistral La Plateforme; a lower $0.02/$0.03 figure also appears in some trackers but I could not confirm it against a primary Mistral source, so kept the better-corroborated $0.15/$0.15 with this caveat noted.
